heuristics.trigger: When a performance bottleneck exists in a legacy DB during a time-sensitive period
heuristics.decision: Use redis caching/buffering instead of a DB migration
heuristics.reasoning: Stability is more important than the 'perfect' DB when deadlines are short

heuristics.trigger: When presented with a legacy migration request
heuristics.decision: Force decomposition of the monolith into serverless/modern components
heuristics.reasoning: Migration is the ONLY time you have political leverage to fix architectural debt
